title: 美国通过对炼油厂实施制裁，将中国卷入战争对峙
content: The United States has imposed sanctions on Chinese refinery operations, extending a broader policy of punitive measures against China's energy sector. The action is intended to pressure China amid escalating tensions with the United States over political and economic disputes. By targeting key refineries, the sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains and influence China's position in the ongoing geopolitical standoff. This move underscores the U.S. strategy of leveraging industrial control to counter Chinese influence and secure compliance with its foreign‑policy objectives.
eventKey: 美国通过对炼油厂实施制裁-将中国卷入战争对峙
normalizedTitle: 美国通过对炼油厂实施制裁 将中国卷入战争对峙
scoreReasoning: 美国制裁中国炼油厂是重大地缘政治升级事件。直接冲击能源与市场，影响广泛且紧急。
summary: The United States has imposed sanctions on Chinese refinery operations, extending a broader policy of punitive measures against China's energy sector. The action is intended to pressure China amid escalating tensions with the United States over political and economic disputes. By targeting key refineries, the sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains and influence China's position in the ongoing geopolitical standoff. This move underscores the U.S. strategy of leveraging industrial control to counter Chinese influence and secure compliance with its foreign‑policy objectives.

title: GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing
content: Starting June 1, your Copilot usage will consume GitHub AI Credits. Skip to content Skip to sidebar / Blog Changelog Docs Customer stories Try GitHub Copilot See what's new AI & ML AI & ML Learn about artificial intelligence and machine learning across the GitHub ecosystem and the wider industry. Change how you work with GitHub Copilot. Everything developers need to know about LLMs. Machine learning tips, tricks, and best practices. Explore the capabilities and benefits of AI code generation and how it can improve your developer experience.
eventKey: github-copilot-moving-usage-based-billing
normalizedTitle: github copilot is moving to usage-based billing
scoreReasoning: 重要生产力工具定价模式变化，影响开发者使用成本与决策，属软件工程关键信号。
summary: GitHub Copilot will shift to usage‑based billing on June 1 2026. All plans will receive a monthly allotment of GitHub AI Credits, calculated by token consumption, and can buy more if needed. Base prices remain unchanged: Pro $10/month, Pro+ $39/month, Business $19/user/month, Enterprise $39/user/month. Code completions stay free of credits; other features use credits. A preview billing tool will launch in May to help users anticipate costs.

title: DeepSeek 为什么主动 “认怂”？
content: 时隔 145 天的 DeepSeek 新版本 V4 终于发布。技术报告的开头，没有 “全球最强”，没有 “打破垄断”，只有一句非常实诚的话：“V4 的能力水平仍落后于 GPT-5.4 和 Gemini-3.1-Pro，发展轨迹大约滞后前沿闭源模型 3 至 6 个月。”

title: 日立计划斥资31亿美元回购股票，而伊朗局势持续发酵
content: Hitachi plans to spend $3.1 billion to buy back its own shares. The announcement comes amid ongoing instability in Iran, which continues to affect global markets and business considerations.

title: Ben Horowitz on Venture Capital and AI
content: Ben Horowitz and AMP founder Anjney Midha discuss how venture capital has evolved from a small, relationship‑driven industry into a scalable system for backing technology firms. They cover network effects, firm design, leadership, culture, and the impact of AI on capital competition and the types of companies that can now be built.

title: DeepSeek V4有望为AI带来系统性革新！港股通信息技术指数近1月累计涨幅超20%
content: The Hong Kong “Information Technology” ETF (159131) has surged over 20% in the first month of 2026, outperforming the Hang Seng Tech and HKIT indices. It focuses on hard‑tech stocks, excluding big‑cap internet firms, and holds major holdings like SMIC, Huawei and Lenovo. Meanwhile, Open Source Securities highlighted that DeepSeek V4, released April 24, could force AI vendors to shift to lower‑cost, open models, boosting domestic chip demand and accelerating AI infrastructure expansion.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 港股科技姐
eventKey: deepseek-v4有望为ai带来系统性革新-港股通信息技术指数近1月累计涨幅超20
